Date: Tue, 04 Mar 2025 16:32:35 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-03-04
Message-ID: <iUHoYc2ORV6hNBlKdt855Q@geopod-ismtpd-37>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="18b5b8a4b3bc296862b0e59fb7c677a53bd539c5bc073d18d9968c72b129"

Hi there, Llama Fam! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter! We
have some exciting updates to share!

First and foremost: we're delighted to announce that LlamaCloud
is now generally available 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.52RaqtmNDwDUwnqaH-AQ0H5JIm87zWGoNvXu3SrHw0E )
! No more waitlists: anyone can sign up today 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6mIVhCu_IH0e1MUWwIQNh4Nsm0NGc1FxHj3sxheGrlU ).

Also happening today: we're announcing that we have raised a $19M
series A funding round 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.52RaqtmNDwDUwnqaH-AQ0H5JIm87zWGoNvXu3SrHw0E )
 led by Norwest Venture Partners. We'll be using this money to
hire more colleagues, so be sure to check out our open positions
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTgxd3hjcHI2ZWZoMzVyNGZqMTZhIn0.Vv-XRbyRVcRjYK7b9cPeLrj9fYPyscglbkZscIt7Lok )!

🤩 The Highlights:

* LlamaExtract Now in Public Beta: Simplify the extraction of
structured data from unstructured documents with LlamaExtract.
Perfect for finance, HR, and healthcare professionals. Read the
full release blog ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pyiITrtsRlEklFrRmRRGWqd-8xEvPBLlqDz5qHyV54s ) | Sign up today 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UPR1dx0JpyLWb1pI5rvWwWn87n-MyyJVzcMxt4oEeu4 ).

* Agentic Productivity Applications: Check out this CRM
assistant, an awesome example of what you can build with
LlamaIndex! Explore here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ziFtDfdVAEwV9xDxCaRzqOeO7eaM5Wievym3QvjRSBw ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaExtract Features: Define and customize schemas for data
extraction, automatically extract well-typed data from diverse
document formats, and integrate with Python SDK for scalable
batch processing. Read the full release blog 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pyiITrtsRlEklFrRmRRGWqd-8xEvPBLlqDz5qHyV54s ).

* Parse With Agent Mode Updates: Our Parse With Agent mode now
supports @AnthropicAI Claude Sonnet 3.7 and @google Gemini 2.0
Flash for improved table parsing and cross-page consistency. Sign
up for LlamaParse today ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..DYIf30lAPmrrqO2HXSgpSLfZraXX7tkU6nFQDJR2uGY ) | Read more
in our docs ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CgG5WkAMX_lsGPpHIz9rPxltgWZJvBSGyX0onsqm1lY ).

✍️ Community:

* Tutorial on Building a Workflow-Based Travel
Planner: Step-by-step guide by RS Rohan on creating an advanced
travel planner using @llama_index. Watch the tutorial video 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rlppqYPtLkDNjYM0ulnDd8kSXz3hQExmngiZGWk1GHI ) | Full repo on @github 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..SGQjRY85qIVLhceIUjf1dxO8ax7QloW26821LGlz_Hs ).

* AI Agent that Generates Tetris: A tutorial from @KaranVaidya6
on building an AI agent that autonomously creates games. Check it
out ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O2LmASnXDCGwLPnGbG1WH1xI4HE3dmpD3vq_0UFEUFc ).

* Building the "World's Fastest" RAG: Insights from
@akshay_pachaar on using @llama_index for orchestration and
@qdrant_engine for vector database optimization. Read more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Rx7SQIKid_viibRooU7sDND1pJ8flf_kGbYOTDT09Lg ).

* Exclusive Talks on AI Infrastructure: Join us for an
eye-opening event on March 5 with @gokoyeb and @tenstorrent. RSVP
required ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..cd5rI-DB6MiNbX6BuQq18aEjZr4Hd0rqWbWUEXeWusg ).

Thank you for being part of our community! We’re excited to see
what you build with LlamaIndex and LlamaParse. If you have any
questions or feedback, feel free to reach out!

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..w71SFVZAz-T97yZZCekiMKeQnHqKfjoC_uF6iegLmoY )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Zbg6PK5mfQRrETOLlOCsUtEqIsC4VQVdmeOQ2OQXbLc )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RB9WbXv-Xo0PBxjankkDGqLDHsqjXCh66Fd8pXn6XDs )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
